name: Stir-Fried Tofu or Beef with Onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut 1 lb Tofu (or flank steak) into thin slices and marinate with sherry, salt, black pepper, soy sauce, sugar, and 1 1/2 teaspoons oil in a shallow dish for 15 minutes.
2. Heat 2 1/2 tablespoons Oil in a wok or pan over high heat. Add ginger and onion, stir-fry for 1 1/2 minutes. Remove onions and let drain.
3. Return oil to the pan. Add tofu (or steak) and garlic, stir-frying until browned.
4. Mix cornstarch and stock mixture, then add to the pan. Cook until thickened.
5. Stir in remaining onion and ginger, cooking for an additional minute.
6. Adjust seasoning if needed and serve over rice or noodles.
